note: I need to add zero-byte validation to resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document in types.py for my feature (throw ValueError on empty bytes). Let me know if you need this file too so we can split by method/line range.

type: REVISE

To avoid clobbering, let's sequence: you edit first and send DONE when finished, then I'll add my new methods after. OK?

I'll send DONE once my edits are in.

my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Finished adding zero-byte validation (seek to end via seek(0,2)/tell(), seek back to 0, raise ValueError if size==0) to resolve_image, resolve_audio, resolve_document. Bodies now return a local 'buffer' variable instead of returning resolve_binary(...) directly, in case that affects where you hook in your resolve_*_with_size wrappers. Go ahead with your additions.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Added resolve_image_with_size(), resolve_audio_with_size(), resolve_document_with_size() right after each corresponding existing method, each returning (BytesIO, int) by seeking to end/tell/seek back to 0. Did not touch the bodies of resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document. Note: my local file view did not show your validation edits (git diff was clean before I started) - just flagging in case your changes didn't land in this copy of the repo.
